capabilities: Concurrency control using locks and transactions to ensure data integrity and system reliability.

procedure.action: Invoke optimistic locking by setting a version number on database records and incrementing it upon updates.

Invoke transactions using ACID-compliant databases to ensure atomicity and consistency following the specified pattern; write a unit test covering the primary code path; assert test_coverage >= 0.8 for the modified module before marking complete.

Execute pessimistic locking by acquiring a lock on resources before executing critical sections by executing the transformation function on each input record; assert output_schema_valid = true and error_count < 1; log transformation_duration_ms.

Compose a retry mechanism with exponential backoff for transaction failures due to lock contention by composing module interfaces via adapter pattern; assert input/output type contracts match before connecting; assert integration_error_count < 1 after contract validation.

Log transaction states and lock acquisitions using structured logging for audit and debugging purposes using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Ensure safe concurrency in software systems by combining locks and transactions, tailored for agent execution environments, to prevent data races and maintain consistency.
title: Implementing Safe Concurrency with Locks and Transactions

failureConditions: Data races occur leading to inconsistent states.
Deadlocks arise from improper lock management; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
Performance degradation due to excessive lock contention.
metrics: test_coverage >= 0.8 for the modified module before marking complete
input/output type contracts match before connecting
successConditions: Run integration tests simulating concurrent access to shared resources; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Check logs for transaction rollback events and analyze causes; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Monitor system performance metrics for signs of lock contention; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
